# uptimekuma_notification_pumble (Resource)

Pumble notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_pumble" "example" {
  name        = "Pumble Notifications"
  webhook_url = "https://api.pumble.com/workspaces/YOUR_WORKSPACE_ID/incomingWebhooks/YOUR_WEBHOOK_ID"
  is_active   = true
  is_default  = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Notification name
- `webhook_url` (String, Sensitive) Pumble webhook URL for sending notifications

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
